summary: Completed frontend testing for P1 features: Partner Detail Page redesign, new animated logo, and expanded footer. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Logo.js correctly implements gradient animation with animate-gradient class and proper colors (KKT=#E91E63 pink, CX=#FFD700 gold)
index.css has gradient-shift keyframes animation for logo (3s ease infinite)
PartnerDetailPage.js has all required data-testid attributes for testing
PublicLayout.js footer has all 5 columns: Brand+Social, North Cyprus, South Cyprus, Platform, Legal
Mobile action bar correctly hidden on desktop (md:hidden) and visible on mobile
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features tested and verified: 1) Partner Detail Page redesign with cover photo, avatar, quick info cards, availability badges, service types, sidebar with price/contact/stats. 2) New animated logo with gradient colors (KKT=pink, CX=gold). 3) Footer with 5 columns including all Cyprus cities.

partner_detail_page.cover_photo_section: PASS - Cover photo displays correctly with gradient overlay
partner_detail_page.profile_avatar: PASS - Avatar visible with rounded corners and border
partner_detail_page.profile_name_age: PASS - Name (Aylin) and age (25) displayed with Vitrin badge
partner_detail_page.availability_badges: PASS - Bugün Müsait, Ev (Incall), Dışarı (Outcall) badges visible
partner_detail_page.sidebar_contact: PASS - Message button and Favorite button working
partner_detail_page.sidebar_stats: PASS - View count, favorites, membership date displayed
partner_detail_page.mobile_action_bar: PASS - Fixed bottom bar with Message and Favorite buttons on mobile
partner_detail_page.lightbox_gallery: INFO - No gallery images for test profile (only 1 image)

logo.gradient_animation: PASS - animate-gradient class applied with gradient-shift keyframes
logo.18_plus_badge: PASS - Badge displayed with pink-purple gradient

footer.brand_social_column: PASS - KKTCX logo, description, 3 social icons (Instagram, Twitter, Telegram)
footer.north_cyprus_cities: PASS - All 5 cities: Girne, Lefkoşa, Gazimağusa, Güzelyurt, İskele
footer.south_cyprus_cities: PASS - All 5 cities: Limasol, Larnaka, Baf (Paphos), Ayia Napa, Protaras
